issues.description: Effect is missing the core mechanic: 'Look at 5 cards from top of deck'. The DSL should include a condition or action to examine the top 5 cards before searching.
Filter is 'Any' but should be 'Sky Island' type. The card text specifies 'reveal up to 1 {Sky Island} type card'.
Missing the 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order' mechanic. Only SearchDeck is present; no action handles returning non-searched cards to bottom of deck.
